title: 24PCS 3D Butterfly Wall Sticker,Double Layer Butterflies Decals for Walls,3D Butterfly Decorations for Home,Bedroom Accessories,Wedding,Party & Flower Decoration (Rainbow)
features: 【Package Contents】:You will get 24 pcs 3d butterfly wall stickers includes magnets and adhesive.These butterflies decals in 4 sizes (6cm/2.36in-8pcs, 8cm/3.15in-8pcs, 10cm/3.93in-4pcs, 12cm/4.72in-4pcs), these colourful butterfly Decorations will be the ideal home accessories.

【Quality Materials】:Our butterfly stickers for wall are made of high quality PVC material, waterproof, colorful and lively, you can use them for a long time, these realistic butterfly will add more charm to your home.

【Elegant Design】:These rainbow butterfly wall stickers for bedrooms are double layer design, the wings of the butterfly can be folded and adjusted, these 3d butterfly wall decor are decorated very realistically and look like butterflies in the garden with great decorative effect.

【Easy to Use】:These butterfly stickers for wall are easy to use, first you gently fold the butterfly's wings in half, then you can use magnets to hold the butterfly wall stickers in place, or you can stick adhesive on the butterfly stickers and stick them where you want to decorate.

【Wide Range of Uses】:These 3d butterfly wall decal are great for Christmas, wedding, birthday party decorations, home art, photography backdrops and other decorations, you can use these stickers to decorate your room, wall, fridge, windows, garden and other places.
